summary: Vercel-ready public-key host template embedded via go:embed plus `tesla auth fleet-template [--dest --gen-key --force]` scaffolder. Generates an EC P256 keypair (private at ~/.tesla/<basename>-private.pem mode 600, public into the template's .well-known path) so the user can `vercel deploy --prod` in one command.
reason: Public-key hosting was the biggest UX cliff in Tesla Fleet API setup. Shipping the Vercel template + key-gen scaffolder in-CLI compresses a multi-day domain side quest into a single command.
validated_outcome: 4 fleet-template tests pass: scaffolds without --gen-key (placeholder PEM preserved), --gen-key writes valid EC P256 and mode-600 private key, refuses non-empty dest without --force, --force overwrites template files but preserves existing private key.
